Sport Fishing Charters in Benalmádena

Feel the adrenaline of fishing on the Costa del Sol. From family trips to professional deep-sea and bottom fishing, we have the gear and the best spots ready for you.

  1. Home
  2. Fishing Experience

Deep Sea & Bottom Fishing Experience

4h to 8h Trips Benalmádena 4.9 (Satisfied Anglers)

All equipment included: top-tier rods, fresh bait, licenses, and the expertise of a local professional captain.

Book My Fishing Spot

Fishing Trip Details & Techniques

Embark on an authentic fishing experience on the Costa del Sol. Whether you are an experienced angler or a first-timer, our trips are designed for everyone to enjoy the catch. We sail to the best fishing grounds between Benalmádena, Marbella and Estepona, selected according to the season and sea currents.

We practice various techniques such as bottom fishing (ideal for catching Snapper, Sea Bream, or Gilthead Bream) and trolling for more active species like Bonito or Mahi-Mahi. Our captain, an expert in local waters, will assist you at all times to maximize your chances of success.

At Rumbomed, we promote responsible fishing. All our trips include the necessary guidance to enjoy the sea while respecting the marine environment in Southern Spain.

What's Included?

  • Collective fishing license included
  • Professional fishing guide (Captain)
  • High-end rods and reels
  • Fresh bait and lures
  • Drinks and snacks on board
  • Ice box for your catches

Sailing & Fishing Plan

01

Welcome & Safety Briefing

Reception at the port, crew introduction, and a brief explanation of equipment handling. We prep the tackle and head out to sea!

Base Port (Estepona/Marbella) Fast Check-in
02

Trolling (Surface Fishing)

As we head toward deeper grounds, we set the lines for trolling. Ideal for catching predators like Bonito, Mahi-Mahi, or Tuna.

Active Sailing Surface Gear
03

Bottom Fishing

We reach the "hotspots" selected by the captain. We anchor or drift for bottom fishing, looking for Snapper and Gilthead Bream.

Selected Grounds High-Def Sonar

Fishing Experience FAQ

Yes, we provide professional rods, reels, fresh bait, and all the necessary tackle for a successful trip.

Not at all! Our expert Captain will guide you through the techniques, whether you are a beginner or an experienced angler.

Yes, as long as they meet the local legal size and species regulations. The Captain will advise you on what can be kept or must be released.

We recommend bringing sunscreen, sunglasses, and a hat. We take care of the rest, including a cooler with ice for your drinks.

Rates & Fishing Charters

Exclusive Sport Fishing Charter

The best price-quality ratio for fishing in Marbella: gear, bait, and licenses included.

From €680 / Half Day

Techniques: Bottom Fishing & Trolling.
Capacity: Up to 6 anglers for maximum comfort.
